Exhibitor Directory

The following companies are exhibiting at Sample Expo 2026 (Booth Hall A).

Mobius Labs

Booth A-12 — On-device NPU compiler stack for edge AI. Production deployments in automotive ADAS and consumer cameras.

mobius.example.com

NeuroDrive Inc.

Booth A-15 — Autonomous driving perception stack. Lidar fusion + edge inference on custom SoC.

neurodrive.example.com

EdgeVision Co., Ltd.

Booth A-22 — Computer vision SDK for smart-city traffic cameras. Real-time license plate and pedestrian detection.

Synaptik Robotics

Booth B-04 — Industrial robotic arm control with on-arm SLAM. Targets electronics-assembly factories.

synaptik.example.com

Quanta MedAI

Booth B-11 — FDA-cleared on-device ultrasound interpretation. Runs on tablet-class compute.
